repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: New York State College of Home Economics Office of the Registrar records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Home Economics. Office of the Registrar

did.abstract: Graduate student photographs and career information.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Graduate student photographs and career information.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: New York State College of Home Economics Office of the Registrar records, #23-11-2701. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to individual student records restricted to permission of student and office of origin during student's lifetime.

did.unittitle: Contains career information and photographs for the following graduate students in the New York State College of Home Economics
Rachel Sanders Bizal MS and PhD
F. June Clark MS and Ed
Mary Osborn Gallway MA and PhD
Marion Soun Lew MS - photo only
Mary Lawson Lewis MS and PhD
Carol Millsom MS and PhD - photo only
Mary Margaret Mueller/Carmichael MS and PhD
Patricia Tapscott Musick/Carr MA and PhD
Graduate Student Registrar Cards with Photos
